## Description

A clear and concise description of the bug.

## Steps to reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Do '...'
3. See the error

## Expected behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual behavior

What actually happened (include exact error text if any).

## Environment

- OS:
- Build / commit SHA:
- Related `plan.md` item (if known):

## Additional context

Screenshots, logs, or anything else that helps. Do NOT attach or paste any
`tally/` reference PDFs or other proprietary material.
